text: Mistral Worldwide Hackathon - Sydney edition at 2026-02-28T09:00:00+11:00

metadata.location: Michael Crouch Innovation Centre, Level G, Hilmer Building (E10), Union Rd, UNSW Sydney, Kensington NSW 2033, Australia
metadata.description:
Get up-to-date information at: https://luma.com/event/evt-5HpmRJyi64mzcvA?pk=g-H2hK7KXBsq5jyDx

Address:
Michael Crouch Innovation Centre
Kensington, New South Wales
Australia

Mistral Worldwide Hackathon - Sydney Edition
Mistral AI is launching its largest hackathon.
Ever.
The Mistral Worldwide hackathon is taking place simultaneously in 7 cities:
Paris / London / NYC / SF / Tokyo / Singapore / Sydney + online.
We're bringing together 1000+ of the best AI engineers for a 2-day overnight hackathon around the world. This hackathon is organized in partnership with Weights & Biases, NVIDIA, AWS and operated by the Iterate team. The other special awards sponsors include ElevenLabs, Hugging Face, Jump Trading, WhiteCircle, UNSW Founders, Arrayah, Supercell and more to…

Hosted by Mistral AI & 3 others

Atlassian are continuing their association with SydJS for another superb year, and you get the rewards.

Each month Atlassian provides the venue, drinks, and pizza we enjoy at our meetings.

And one month a year they go above and beyond and also provide us with an insight to the teams, the code, and the company.

To keep the tradition going we’re clearing the runway and making room in March to hear from their team. And their team will be fresh from Atlassian’s own EngFest, their twice yearly local, internal conference.

We’ve got our sights on an international speaker and they’ll be backed up by two of Sydney’s own:

Shrey Somaiya will show us how static analysis can reduce your workload from weeks to seconds.

Coby Plain will reveal “Good Developer Habits” that are bad at Atlassian scale.

And stay tuned for news on our guest speaker

It’s set to be a GREAT night!
